case_title: GERDA KIRCHER VS. KENNETH E CAMPBELL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, KENNETH E

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, GERDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, KENNETH E THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1272 MARKET ST. #301, S.F. CA. 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, KENNETH E
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, GERDA SERVED JUL-14-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, KENNETH E
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $22.86 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, GERDA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, KENNETH E
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, GERDA AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, KENNETH E SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
